data.title: Apple, Tesla And Other MAG 7 Peers Too Expensive? Top Hedge Fund Challenges 'Overvaluation' Concerns, Says They Are Fairly Priced If They Sustain 20% Earnings Growth Rate
data.description: Top Hedge Fund Bridgewater Associates has questioned the widespread notion that the 'Magnificent Seven' stocks are overvalued, while the rest of the S&P 500 stocks are comparatively undervalued.

data.title: Claudia Sheinbaum Says Mexican Government May Sue Google Over 'Gulf Of Mexico' Name Change
data.description: Mexico is considering suing Google for renaming the Gulf of Mexico the "Gulf of America" following Trump's executive order. Apple has also complied, but Bing Maps and MapQuest have not yet made the change.

data.title: Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin To Lay Off 10% Employees Despite Successful Launch To Orbit: Report
data.description: Jeff Bezos' space company Blue Origin is reportedly laying off about 10 percent of its workforce despite a successful launch of its New Glenn launch vehicle in January.

data.title: Brian Armstrong Wants To Handle Growing Volumes Of Memecoins By Adding DEXes Into Coinbase: 'A Little Bit Like The Early Days Of The Internet'
data.description: Brian Armstrong, the CEO of Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ:COIN), has voiced the necessity for a reevaluation of the company’s token listing process amid a surge in meme coin launches.

data.title: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway Sells Nearly $36 Million Worth Of Dialysis Giant DaVita's Shares Amid Q4 Earnings Beat
data.description: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway has cut its stake in the dialysis provide DaVita Inc according to a U.S. SEC filing.
